tool_args.label: Fuel Hedge Program Description
tool_args.raw_text: MTA's fuel hedging program mitigates budget risk by dollar cost averaging approximately 50% of projected fuel expenses. The goal of the program is to be 50% hedged for the next 12 months. Monthly hedges are equal to approximately 4% of the projected fuel purchases expected to occur 13-24 months from each hedge execution date.

payload.claim_text: MTA's fuel hedging program mitigates budget risk by dollar cost averaging approximately 50% of projected fuel expenses. The goal of the program is to be 50% hedged for the next 12 months. Monthly hedges are equal to approximately 4% of the projected fuel purchases expected to occur 13-24 months from each hedge execution date.

tool_args.label: No Active CNG Hedges
tool_args.raw_text: While the fuel hedging program includes compressed natural gas, there are currently no active hedges.

payload.claim_text: While the fuel hedging program includes compressed natural gas, there are currently no active hedges.

tool_args.label: Actual Hedge Percentage May Vary
tool_args.raw_text: The actual percentage hedged could be higher or lower than the 50% target depending on the actual levels of fuel consumption.

payload.claim_text: The actual percentage hedged could be higher or lower than the 50% target depending on the actual levels of fuel consumption.
